segments.text: Villager's recovery is also incredibly clean. So many different routes!
segments.original_text: きくざかり村人の復帰もとても綺麗 本当にルート様々

segments.text: With Villager, and oh wait—here comes the aerial!
segments.original_text: 村人と、おっとここは空中レトロが

full_text: Villager's recovery is also incredibly clean. So many different routes! With Villager, and oh wait—here comes the aerial!
